decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with mana acceleration and efficient creature plays. Utilizing cards like Fyndhorn Elves and Llanowar Elves to ramp into powerful creatures like Deranged Hermit and Multani's Acolyte, the goal is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a flurry of aggressive elves. The inclusion of cards like Survival of the Fittest and Wirewood Symbiote allows for card advantage and deck manipulation, ensuring consistent threats on the battlefield. The deck aims to quickly establish dominance and maintain pressure throughout the game.

The main focus of this deck is to control the opponent's board while utilizing Oath of Druids to quickly bring out powerful creatures such as Terravore. The deck also includes disruption elements like Sphere of Resistance and Winter's Grasp to slow down the opponent's game plan. The mana base is optimized for consistency with Mox Diamond and various land types. Sylvan Library provides card advantage and selection. Overall, the deck aims to out-value the opponent through efficient control and powerful threats brought out by Oath of Druids.

This deck focuses on using cards like Replenish and Attunement to bring powerful enchantments like Opalescence and Parallax Wave onto the battlefield quickly. The goal is to create a board state that overwhelms the opponent with enchantments and control effects, while also using cards like Defense Grid and Decree of Silence to protect the combo. Frantic Search and Intuition provide card draw and tutoring to find key pieces of the combo. The deck aims to lock down the opponent while setting up a game-winning board presence with its enchantment combo.

The focus of this deck is to quickly assemble and protect the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo, using cards like Stifle, Foil, and Counterspell to disrupt opponents. The deck also includes card draw and cantrips like Gush, Accumulated Knowledge, and Vision Charm to find combo pieces and maintain card advantage. With a low land count and a focus on manipulating the top of the library with cards like Portent and Impulse, this deck aims to win the game efficiently through a powerful combo while controlling the opponent's strategy.

The deck focuses on using enchantments to gain incremental advantage, drawing cards, and ramping up mana with Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence. The key strategy is to set up a lock with Opalescence turning all enchantments into creatures and Sterling Grove protecting key pieces. Replenish is used to bring back enchantments from the graveyard, and Parallax Wave provides removal and recursion. The deck aims to establish a board state where it can control the game and overwhelm the opponent with a combination of card advantage, mana acceleration, and disruptive enchantments.

This deck focuses on playing aggressive goblin creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent and deal damage as quickly as possible. It includes cards that allow you to search for specific goblins, give your goblins additional abilities, and generate extra damage. The deck also includes cards to deal with any potential threats from the opponent. The key strategy is to use the synergy between the goblin creatures and their abilities to create a fast and powerful offensive force that can win the game before the opponent has a chance to respond effectively.

The deck focuses on stalling the game with counterspells and disruption while waiting to assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat that can quickly end the game. It also includes card draw and selection to help find pieces of the combo and protect against opposing strategies. The goal is to keep the opponent off balance and unable to respond effectively while setting up the win condition.

This deck focuses on utilizing Goblin Welder and Tinker to control the game by manipulating artifacts and disrupting the opponent's resources. The key strategy involves using cards like Winter Orb, Tangle Wire, and Sphere of Resistance to slow down the opponent's pace while generating advantage through cards like Mind Stone and Thran Dynamo. With powerful finishers like Karn, Silver Golem and Triskelion, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and secure victory through resource management and strategic plays.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive Goblin creatures, utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Warchief to quickly deploy threats. The deck includes removal options like Gempalm Incinerator and Mogg Fanatic to clear the way for the Goblins to attack. The deck also includes card advantage engines like Goblin Ringleader to keep the pressure on the opponent. With a mix of creatures, removal, and mana denial in the form of cards like Rishadan Port and Wasteland, this deck aims to maintain a fast and aggressive board presence to win games quickly.

The main focus of this Mono Black Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of efficient creatures and disruptive spells. By using cards like Hypnotic Specter and Ravenous Rats to pressure the opponent's hand and board state, along with powerful removal spells like Smother and Vendetta, this deck aims to establish early control and close out the game with aggressive creatures like Withered Wretch and Masticore. The inclusion of disruptive cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress further adds to this strategy, making it difficult for the opponent to execute their game plan.

The main focus of this Mono Black Control deck is to heavily disrupt your opponent's game plan through a combination of hand disruption and board control. By using cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress to strip away key cards from your opponent's hand, while also utilizing cards like Innocent Blood and Contamination to control the board and lock your opponent out of resources, you can grind down your opponent's resources and eventually win the game with cards like Nether Spirit and Zombie Infestation. This deck aims to control the game from start to finish and outvalue the opponent in the long run.

The main concept of this Mono Red Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan by destroying their mana base and key permanents, while using efficient removal spells and creatures to control the board. The deck focuses on resource denial and incremental advantage through land destruction, while also having the ability to close out the game with efficient burn spells and creatures. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent by utilizing its disruptive elements and efficient threats to gain and maintain control of the game.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of card advantage and disruption, while utilizing the powerful creature Psychatog as a finisher. By drawing cards with Accumulated Knowledge and Impulse, countering opponent's spells with Counterspell and Foil, and stripping their hand with Duress, this deck aims to outlast opponents and protect Psychatog until it can close out the game. The mana base is designed to support this strategy with consistent access to the necessary colors for spells and lands to activate abilities.

The deck focuses on using Tinker to search for and play Phyrexian Devourer, combining it with Fling to deal a large amount of damage to the opponent in a single turn. This combo is supported by cards like Altar of Dementia, Chromatic Sphere, Defense Grid, Mind Stone, Sky Diamond, Portent, and Sylvan Library to control the game and provide resources. The mana base consists of fast lands like Ancient Tomb and City of Traitors, as well as City of Brass, Gemstone Mine, Crosis's Catacombs, and Yavimaya Coast.

The main idea of this deck is to utilize the Tinker combo to quickly assemble and sacrifice a Phyrexian Devourer, with the goal of flinging its massive power at the opponent for game-ending damage. The deck includes various cards to support this strategy, such as Defense Grid to protect key pieces, Altar of Dementia for additional sacrifice options, and Oath of Druids to potentially bring out the combo pieces faster. The deck also includes card draw and mana acceleration to help set up the combo efficiently.
